title: Certified affine extraction from CNF in Lean 4
description:
A Lean 4 artifact for certified affine-structure extraction and GF(2) semantic preservation for scoped Tseitin-style CNF families, with a machine-checked, axiom-audited theorem surface.

v0.3.0 adds a reusable private-incident sufficient condition for SemanticExtractorCompleteOn over Tseitin CNF formulas, deriving certified affine extraction completeness from graph-local private-incident witnesses and positive degree. It also includes a non-cycle P3 witness routed through the public CertifiedAffine surface. The audit surface is lean/CertifiedAffine/Audit.lean.

Non-claims (binding): this artifact does not claim or imply P = NP, P != NP, a general SAT algorithm, a general CNF-to-XOR recognizer, a matchgate/Pfaffian/GCT/holographic/halting-style result, or any result beyond the explicitly-scoped, Lean-checked theorems for the named Tseitin-style families.
